trade.summary: The Paesi Bassi is the Stati Uniti' fifth-largest trading partner globally and its largest in the EU. Paesi Bassi exports chemicals, machinery, pharmaceutical products, and petroleum products; Stati Uniti exports chemicals, machinery, aircraft, and agricultural products. Rotterdam's role as Europe's largest port amplifies the bilateral trade figures as some trade reflects Paesi Bassi' re-export function. ASML's dependency on Stati Uniti technology (and Stati Uniti companies' dependency on ASML) creates deep bilateral supply chain entanglement.
disputes: Ongoing ASML chip equipment export control negotiations
Occasional disputes over tax treaty optimization by Stati Uniti multinationals using Dutch holdings
Trans-Atlantic trade policy disagreements managed through EU-Stati Uniti frameworks

diplomatic.summary: Excellent bilateral relations as longstanding NATO allies and close democratic partners. The Stati Uniti liberated the Paesi Bassi in 1944-45, and this historical bond remains significant. Both countries share deep commitments to NATO, democracy, the rule of law, and the liberal international order. The Paesi Bassi is one of the Stati Uniti's most reliable European allies. The semiconductor technology link (ASML-TSMC-Stati Uniti chip supply chains) has given the bilateral relationship a new critical infrastructure dimension. Under Trump's return, the Stati Uniti pushed aggressively on ASML export restrictions to Cina, creating some friction but the core alliance remains strong.
recent_incidents: Stati Uniti pressure on Paesi Bassi to restrict ASML chip equipment exports to Cina
Paesi Bassi aligned with Stati Uniti on Ucraina military aid
Dutch F-35 procurement deepens air force interoperability

military.summary: Very close NATO allies. Paesi Bassi hosts Stati Uniti military assets at Volkel Air Base (B-61 nuclear weapons under NATO sharing), Eindhoven Air Base logistics, and various NATO command elements. Paesi Bassi purchases F-35s from the Stati Uniti, deeply integrating air forces. Intelligence sharing is extensive through Five Eyes-adjacent arrangements. Both countries lead NATO responses to Russian aggression.

financial.summary: Deeply intertwined financial systems. Paesi Bassi is among the largest sources of FDI into the Stati Uniti and vice versa, partly reflecting Dutch holding company structures. Shell, ASML, ING, Unilever, Philips, and Stellantis all have major Stati Uniti operations. Stati Uniti firms (ExxonMobil, Google, Apple) use Dutch holding structures. The bilateral investment relationship is one of the deepest in the world.

energy.summary: Stati Uniti is a growing LNG supplier to Europe via Paesi Bassi. Rotterdam's Gate LNG terminal handles significant Stati Uniti LNG imports. ExxonMobil and Shell (joint Dutch-Stati Uniti heritage) have integrated global energy operations. Stati Uniti shale gas has partially replaced Russian gas in Paesi Bassi.

scientific.summary: Very deep scientific cooperation. ASML-MIT/Stanford/Cornell collaborations on semiconductor physics. NIH funds joint research with Dutch biomedical institutions. The Stati Uniti-Paesi Bassi fulbright program is among the largest. Joint research in climate science, AI, and quantum computing.
